title: Poo Bags with Dog Poop Bag Dispenser & Refill Rolls - 12 Dog Poop Bags Rolls (15 Bags Each) - Leak-Proof & Extra Thick Mess-Free Dog Waste Bags - Perfect for Walks & Outdoor Use
features: NO MORE WORRIES ON WALKS: Taking your pet out can be stressful when you're unsure how to handle the mess. Comfy Pets Poo Bags eliminate the worry with their thick, leak-proof design, keeping your hands clean and making waste disposal effortless. Stay prepared and stress-free, no matter where your pet goes.

GENEROUS SUPPLY FOR LONG-TERM USE: With 180 poo bags in a single pack, Comfy Pets ensures you’ll never run out when it matters most. Each roll is easy to store in the provided dispenser, and the leash attachment keeps them ready at hand, making every walk smoother and more convenient.

ECO-FRIENDLY SOLUTION FOR RESPOSNSIBLE PET OWNERS: Contribute to a cleaner planet while caring for your pet. Comfy Pets Poo Bags are made from post-consumer recycled plastic, giving landfill-bound waste a second life. These biodegradable bags offer an environmentally conscious choice without compromising on durability or quality.

EXTRA-LARGE AND BUILT FOR CONVENIENCE: Designed to handle any mess, Comfy Pets Poo Bags are extra-large (33 × 23 cm) and perfect for both dogs and cats. Durable and easy to use, they come with a convenient dispenser and leash attachment, ensuring you’re always prepared for quick and tidy cleanups. Dimensions of the product are 13.7 × 6.6 × 12.6 centimetres.

OUR STORY: At Comfy Pets, we believe in making pet care simple, reliable, and eco-friendly. Founded in the UK, our mission is to provide high-quality, practical products. As lifelong pet lovers, we understand the daily challenges and joys of pet ownership, which is why we design every product with your comfort and your pet’s well-being in mind. We’re committed to offering solutions that you can trust, making every walk and every moment with your pet feel like home.
